mapper.select: select * from domain_test_case where vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} and domain_index_id = #{domainIndexId}

SELECT
a.test_instruct, a.interpretation_of_result, concat(d.brand,"-",c.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, b.index_name,b.definition detail,
a.test_instruct_en test_instruct, a.interpretation_of_result_en interpretation_of_result, concat(d.brand_en,"-",c.vehicle_model) vehicle_name, b.index_name_en index_name,b.definition_en detail,
a.score, a.response_photo_name url, a.vehicle_id FROM `vehicle_domain_test_case` a, vehicle_domain_index b, vehicle_base_info c, vehicle_brand d where a.domain_index_id = #{domainIndexId}
AND a.domain_index_id = b.id and a.vehicle_id = c.id and c.brand_id = d.id
